weak_aliases.reason: Local observation IDs and dataset-specific aliases useful for search but not merge authority.
Local observation ID useful for search but not merge authority.

suggested_rules: When two entity records share the same entity_name, same display_name, same jurisdiction scope, and share an identity key, merge them even if entity_type has trivial formatting differences (e.g., underscore vs space).
rationale: Both records refer to the New York State Legislature, share the identity key entity_new-york-state-legislature, have identical entity_name and display_name, and the only difference is a trivial formatting variation between 'government_body' and 'government body' (already merged in record 1's _merged_field_values). The validator flagged this as a duplicate_global_identity with score 100. All evidence from three MTA documents references the same government body. No scope or jurisdictional differences exist.
